message:
Add ACFS manifest parsing tests + registry-driven setup (bd-1rdc)

Unit tests for tool-registry.service covering:
- Cache behavior with configurable TTL
- Manifest path resolution with env var overrides
- Error mapping with structured logging (manifest_parse_error, manifest_validation_error)
- Logs include manifestPath, manifestHash, schemaVersion, and errorCategory

All 6 tests pass with 25 assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
